_comment:
Hand-curated orientations for spots where the geometric algorithm cannot resolve the seaward bearing. Applied by pipeline/enrich.py between Algorithm 1 (orientation) and Algorithm 2 (swell window), so the orientation-derived fallback builds arcs against the correct value. Treated as authoritative — overrides both the algorithmic result and LLM verification. Match by exact spot name.

WHEN TO ADD AN ENTRY:
- Great Lakes spots (GSHHG L1 lumps the lakes with land — orientation returns null)
- Complex harbors, jetties, rivermouths where the coastline normal misrepresents the actual break geometry
- Barrier-island spots whose Nominatim geocode landed on the bay side and whose automatic 180° hemisphere flip didn't cover it
- Spots in Alaska / Guam / territories not covered by the region hemisphere table

FIELDS:
- orientation_deg (required, 0-359): the seaward-facing bearing. 0=N, 90=E, 180=S, 270=W. This is the direction the rider looks when facing the incoming swell.
- source (optional): short attribution — 'local knowledge', 'surf-forecast.com manual check', 'OSM way heading', etc.
- notes (optional): any disambiguation that matters (e.g. 'Pier points straight offshore', 'Break faces the reef pass rather than the beach', or flagging that the spot's coord looks wrong and needs a fix in spot_coord_fixes.json).

Grand Haven South Pier.notes: Pier points straight west into the lake

Grand Haven State Park.notes: Beach adjacent to the pier; same facing

Frankfort Beach.notes: Point Betsie area; open lake due west

Silver Beach.source: Lake Michigan east shore (St. Joseph, MI)

Whihala Beach.notes: At the south tip of the lake; open water due north

Duluth Park Point.notes: Park Point is a sandspit extending SE from Duluth; outside beach faces ESE into the open lake

Stoney Point MN.source: Lake Superior north shore (Two Harbors area, MN)
Stoney Point MN.notes: Point break facing SSE into the lake

Woodlawn Beach.source: Lake Erie east end (Woodlawn Beach State Park, NY south of Buffalo)

Presque Isle Beach.source: Lake Erie south shore (Presque Isle State Park, PA)
Presque Isle Beach.notes: Peninsula curves N/NE; popular surf beaches face NNE

Peahi Jaws.notes: Pe'ahi bowl faces NNW winter swell; slight east-of-north facing

Vilano Beach.source: Florida east coast near St. Augustine
Vilano Beach.notes: Beach faces ENE; slight bend at Vilano inlet

IB Jetty.source: Imperial Beach, CA — south jetty at the border
IB Jetty.notes: Jetty points SW into the Pacific

Gooch's Beach.notes: Atlantic-facing beach with a SE bend toward Wells Bay

Avalon NJ.notes: MANUAL ORIENTATION APPLIED BUT COORDS LOOK WRONG — (40.82, -74.32) is inland NJ near Livingston, not the actual Avalon at ~(39.10, -74.72). Needs entry in spot_coord_fixes.json to correct lat/lng before enrichment can compute buoy/tide.

Ocean Isle Beach.notes: Island runs E-W; faces south into Long Bay

Sunset Beach NC.source: Brunswick County, NC (adjacent to Ocean Isle)

Florence South Jetty.source: Oregon coast at the Siuslaw River mouth
Florence South Jetty.notes: Jetty faces west into the open Pacific

Charlestown Town Beach.source: South Rhode Island coast / Block Island Sound

Indicators Rincon.notes: Just N of Domes; faces WNW

Marias Rincon.notes: Maria's faces slightly N of W

Domes Beach Aguadilla.notes: Aguadilla coast curves from W-facing (Rincon) to N-facing; Domes here faces NW

Gas Chambers Aguadilla.source: Aguadilla, PR (Ramey Air Force Base reef)

La Ocho.source: North coast of Puerto Rico (Arecibo / Manatí area)

Playa Kikita.source: North coast of Puerto Rico (Manatí area)

Kamea Meha.source: North coast of Puerto Rico (San Juan area)
Kamea Meha.notes: Coord near San Juan's Condado/Isla Verde; faces N

The Room.source: North coast of Puerto Rico (Isabela area)

Sebastian Inlet.source: surf-forecast.com verified — optimal NE swell, SW offshore
Sebastian Inlet.notes: Jetty break faces NE into Atlantic
